channel.title: seed germination on funPlantGenes
channel.description: Recent content in seed germination on funPlantGenes

item.title: ZmABA2

item.title: ZmLEC1
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Gene Symbol: ZmLEC1 Gene Name: LEAFY COTYLEDON1 Genome: Species: Zea mays Functional Descriptions: Expression of ZmLEC1 and ZmWRI1 Increases Seed Oil Production in Maize.

item.title: ZmTCP42;tcptf38
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: GRMZM2G180568 Gene Symbol: ZmTCP42 tcptf38 Gene Name: TCP-transcription factor 38 Genome: B73_RefGen_v3 Species: Zea mays Functional Descriptions: Importantly, genetic variations in ZmTCP32 and ZmTCP42 are significantly associated with drought tolerance at the seedling stage.
